---
title: "Road user video evidence of road traffic offences: Preliminary analysis of operation snap data and suggestions for a research agenda"
description: "Graham Farrell, Robin Lovelace, and Steve O’Hern (2024). Road user video evidence of road traffic offences: Preliminary analysis of operation snap data and suggestions for a research agenda. https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/cgjmr"
date: "2024-07-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "farrell_road_user_video_2024"
citation-type: ""
citation-type-label: ""
venue: ""
doi: "10.31235/osf.io/cgjmr"
publication-url: "https://osf.io/cgjmr"
authors:
  - "Graham Farrell"
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Steve O’Hern"
---

**Type:** 
**Year:** 2024

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/cgjmr) [Publisher Link](https://osf.io/cgjmr) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Graham Farrell, Robin Lovelace, and Steve O’Hern (2024). Road user video evidence of road traffic offences: Preliminary analysis of operation snap data and suggestions for a research agenda. https://doi.org/10.31235/osf.io/cgjmr

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{farrell_road_user_video_2024,
  title = {Road User Video Evidence of Road Traffic Offences: Preliminary Analysis of Operation Snap Data and Suggestions for a Research Agenda},
  author = {Farrell, Graham and Lovelace, Robin and O'Hern, Steve},
  date = {2024-07},
  doi = {10.31235/osf.io/cgjmr},
  url = {https://osf.io/cgjmr},
  langid = {english}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
